feed.title: SAP Community - SAP HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: CDS View with aggregation
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to know if what I want to do is possible in CDS views without doing ABAP.

Is it possible to create a custom CDS view that have aggregation (sum of stock) already calculated in it. The goal would be to join this view to another one with aggregation.

We would like to do a report with available and reserved stock group by Material/Plant/Storage Location (basically MB52 with reserved)

First try, I create a Custom view on I_MATERIALSTOCK_2 with Material/Plant/Storage as Key and configured the Stock as sum with Element Properties.
Then, I create another custom view with I_ReservationDocumentItem similarly.
Then, I join those two view on the keys Material/Plant/Storage and create an analytical query on this view. This gives wrong values because each stock is multiplied by the number of lines from the other view.

Second try, I wanted to join the C_MaterialStockActual view to I_ReservationDocumentItem. But this fails as I cannot use C_MaterialStockActual in another CDS View.

Any guidance or feedback is appreciated.

Julien

entry.title: SAP HANA : Cannot create Instance
entry.content:
Hi, I am trying to install SAP HANA using the MS Azure VM (open suse 15 )
But not able to install
I am getting below error

 


Installing components...
Configuring SAP HANA Database...
Configuring System...
Configuring instance...
Resume of SAP HANA Express Edition Installation failed
Installation of SAP HANA Database failed
Installation failed
error installing

SAP HANA Enterprise Cloud  SAP HANA Cloud

entry.title: S/4Hana technical performance and volume plan
entry.content:
Hello sap gurus!

I need to create a plan for performance and volume plan in S/4Hana, someone have where can I found information, how to create this plan? (Something about how to test hana database growing and performance and applictation server).

Regards, 

Anderson CM.

entry.title: CO08 - When I try to create a PO reference with SO using Tcode - CO08. CO object error
entry.content:
Problem Statement:

I am trying to create a production order with reference to a sales order using Tcode CO08. However, when executing the transaction, I encounter the following error:
"Sales order has no CO object."

I have attached a screenshot of the error message for reference.

Can anyone suggest how I can resolve this error and successfully create a production order?

entry.title: I want to restrict to a fewer line items for Std odata service SD_PRICING_CONDITIONRECORD
entry.content:
Hi All,

I  want to restrict to a fewer line items for odata service SD_PRICING_CONDITIONRECORD which is used in Fiori App Manage Prices ( Sales  ) . Could you please let me know the best way for this.

1) Copy the standard Odata service into custom and create a new FIORI  app or 

2) Is  there any way that can we control the Output of standard fiori app Fiori App Manage Prices ( Sales  ).

I know we can add additional Fields using Custom Fields and Logic app .  But my question is different I want to add additional logic to the standard odata service so that I can get only records based on some condition.

 

Thanks,

Bala

entry.title: Issues in extracting oracle table where security is built around it using sap DS
entry.content:
We are working on a project migrating oracle ERP data to SAP HANA Using SAP data services. Our Current SAP HANA Version is HANA 2.0 SPS 05.   SAP Data Services  4.3 SPS 02

There are certain tables in Oracle where security is build around it.

We have a run a procedure before viewing the data in Oracle .  MO_GLOBAL.SET_POLICY_CONTEXT ('S','ORG_ID')  and run the select query to read the data.

These should happen in the same session, but when trying to do this in SAP Data services, the session changes.  

Please provide your suggestions on extracting data from security built tables.

Regards,

Karthik Rajan P

entry.title: HANA update to revision 81
entry.content:
Current environment:
OS :suse15sp2
DB :PERSON_NAME IP_ADDRESS
Target environment for upgrade:
OS :suse15sp6
DB :PERSON_NAME 2.0 revision 81
We want to upgrade the current operating system to suse15sp6, according to DIGITS- SAP PERSON_NAME: Supported Operating Systems， Should I upgrade the database to revision 59.12 first, and then upgrade the database to revision 80 after the OS is upgraded to suse15sp6.

Question and Answer:
Q: Please categorize your issue by choosing the option below that best fits your scenario.
A: PERSON_NAME Software

Q: SAP PERSON_NAME Revision number and Operating System where software is being installed
A:

Q: Software being upgraded (source and target)?
A:

Q: When did the issue last occur (MMM,DD, YYYY)
A:


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: can't start DB in DR after stop it
entry.content:
i start a DR on 2 hana database ( in 2  locations ) and now i think both working fine

but how i can use the secondary database if the primary data center get anything and i wanna to use the second one 

when i stop the DR and try to open it without DR i get error and can't use it .. and same when i try to take a backup from it i get a error in hana studio so how can i use the database in the 2nd location if i lose connection in the 1st one

entry.title: How to use virtual elements into a child CDS View?
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm trying to fill some fields using virtual element procedure however my class/calculate isn't working. 

I'm creating a list report will call a object page with another list. These two levels are working good but I need to fill a specific field calling a abap function module and the virtual element was my first option.

It's curious in the first level, I'm using virtual elements too and it works well.

Did anyone seen that before? Below some screenshots to clarify.

First list - OK (ABAP class/method is calling) :



Second list - NOK (ABAP class/method is NOT calling) :



SAP HANA 

Best regards,

Felipe

entry.title: Approach for Transferring GSTIN from "Search Term 2" to "PAN" Field in Business Partner Creation
entry.content:
What is the best approach to seamlessly copy the GSTIN number, retrieved via an API and stored in the "Search Term 2" field under the "Address" tab during the creation of a Business Partner (BP), to the "PAN" field located in the "Ctry Spec Enh" tab? 

Attaching images for your reference.

entry.title: hana on premise atc using simplification db
entry.content:
We are on SAP Hana on premise system.

When doing developments and performing ATC in Dev system getting error as below (image attached).

Do we need to setup a separate evaluation system as suggested in several blogs ?

Or we can simply setup simplification db - 2241080 on the Dev system ?

entry.title: Transport from ECC to S/4 Hana
entry.content:
Hello All,

we have two instances one is ECC and another is S4 Hana. Is there any possibility to move report which is developed in ECC to S4 Hana system. Your answer will be highly appreciated.  ABAP Development ABAP Extensibility

entry.title: Query mechanism problem during SAP HANA recovery
entry.content:
Hi experts，

When restoring the SAP HANA database using backint, I found a problem. For example, I did one or two full backup at 10:00 and 12:00. When the full backup at 12:00 was completed, a catalog named log_backup_0_0_0_0 was backed up. Now I initiate a recovery to 10:30. Using this catalog, the order of data it inquires starts from the full backup at 12:00, and then looks forward to 10:00. If there are many full backup, this search should affect the efficiency. Moreover, I can query through hdbbackupdiag tool that the data that the recovery time point 10:30 depends on is the full backup at 10:00. Why not just look for the full backup corresponding to 10:00?

entry.title: Issue in XSJS query execution
entry.content:
Hi All,

Recieved the error 500 conn.executeQuery is not a function.

While following the module, SAP HANA XS Advanced, Creating a Node.js Module

 

Whole other application is running fine. 

but only with /xsjs/hdb.xsjs extension to url facing this issue.

Thanks

entry.title: Bank Integration through API
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We are in process of API based Bank Integration where the data will be sent in a JASON file using CPI. We are not clear on:

1. What config we need to do in our system?

2. What program we need to maintain under FBZP> Payment method in Country > Use Classic payment medium programs (RFFO*)

Any other thing we need to consider?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Pool/parallel/ihm in HANA
entry.content: What is the significance of memory allocator - "Pool/parallel/ihm" in HANA?

entry.title: Why we have values in GR/IR account.
entry.content:
It is required by the financial standards, at the end of every FI period, the GR/RI accounts have to be split into two accounts

GR/IR Classification

  • Goods Received but not Invoiced} it is under liability
  • Goods Invoiced but not received} it is under Asset

In Sap the transaction posted for GR/IR Classification will go through all the open PO and check why we have balance.

The GR/IR Analysis/Maintenance transaction is run to write off the quantity remains in expense(loss) account.

entry.title: SAP HANA Service pack upgrade - High importance
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are planning to upgrade  HANA 2.0 SP 5 to 2.0 SPS 7 or higher or SPS 8. Will there be any Impact on existing BW and HANA models?

 

Thanks,

Prabhakar

entry.title: HANA HotSpots General Reportの生成依頼
entry.content:
S4HANA DIGITS Initial Shipment Stack から S4HANA DIGITS SPS01 へのアップグレード後、様々なビジネストランザクション、特に更新系アクションで処理速度が低下する事象が発生しており、原因分析のためGeneral Reportをもとに調査を行いたいと考えております。

PERSON_NAME HotSpots General Reportを生成いただく、または生成方法をご教示いただくことは可能でしょうか。

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Clear old data in tables DD03L, DDMTT_ISU, DDMTT_SAV (S4H)
entry.content:
Hi, experts

 

Can you help me with issues for clear old data from tables DD03L, DDMTT_ISU, DDMTT_SAV.

Maybe, somebody know how I can do this? Maybe archiving or some else standard instrument?

Thanks
